messages.text: Filed Stripe support ticket #cs-9924 for the signing-secret whitelist on staging. They said 1-3 business days. ENG-142 blocked until that lands.

Helix pulse done. Marcus wants firm v2 migration date by Mon 06-15. He mentioned ~40 duplicate event_ids in last week's daily reconciliation — assumed it was on their side; I said we'd confirm and circle back. Notes in ENG-155.

Brightline call done. Elena saw 47 dupes in Monday's reconciliation report. Finance is annoyed; she wants a written explanation by Fri 06-12. Renewal 2026-11-30 — flagging Brightline as at-risk. Notes in ENG-155.
Want me to loop in on the written explanation? I can frame it as 'we're investigating, will share root-cause by EOW' so Elena has something to hold on to.

Quick update from Northbound pitch yesterday — Rachel Goldman was warm and asked the right questions. She emailed today with 3 follow-ups: (1) 90d cohort ARR breakdown by tier, (2) competitive-moat rewrite of slide 14, (3) intros to 2 customer references. I promised EOW. Partner mtg booked for Wed 06-17.
Nice. What do you need from us?
Sam's owning the customer refs in ENG-157, I'll handle cohort + slide. Will share drafts in this channel before sending to Rachel.
Started ENG-149 latency work. Profiling shows ~140ms in tenant config lookup. Going to try Redis cache with 60s TTL + invalidation on settings update.
Stripe SE Naomi just auto-replied OOO until 6/15. Want me to escalate via partnerships now or wait?
Wait — let me ping her direct first. If she doesn't reply by EOD tomorrow, partnerships.
Hey did Rachel get the cohort breakdown? She just messaged me asking if we're still on for Wed partner mtg.
Working on it tonight, will send by EOD Thu. Tell her yes for Wed.

Vesta pulse (Dan Kowalski) rescheduled to Mon 06-15 09:00 PT — his ask, internal hardware migration on their side. Heads-up: Dan is the engineer most likely to escalate the duplicate-event reports to Vesta finance if we don't get ahead of it.

FYI — Rachel @ Northbound asked Maya for 2 customer refs (Series A DD). Thinking Verdant Foods + Northwind Pay (both v2, NPS 9 + 8, both confirmed willing in last QBR). Filed ENG-157. Confirm before I draft the warm-intro asks?
Confirmed — those two. I'll send the warm intros once Sam pings them to give a heads-up.
+1, both are good ambassadors. Verdant's CFO especially likes talking accuracy lift.

Anyone seen tickets for duplicate event_ids in the daily reconciliation reports? 3rd customer this week — Marcus (Helix), Elena (Brightline), Dan (Vesta). Want to make sure we have a triage issue open before this escalates.

Closest is ENG-135 (schema validation hardening), but that doesn't directly track the customer reports. We probably want a separate triage issue — "duplicate event_ids in daily reconciliation on high-volume tenants". Alex?
I can file one tomorrow if no one beats me to it. Need 30 min to pull a few event_ids from the warehouse first so the issue has real evidence.

v1 metering API deprecation — proposing we set sunset for 2026-09-30. Reasoning in pierside Notion `/decisions/2026-06-11-v1-sunset`. ~50% of support load last quarter came from v1 schema ambiguity (`event_id` typing, missing `tenant_id`). v2 GA since April. Need approvals from you both.
Approved. We can ship migration guide this week (ENG-154 — Jordan's on it).
Approved. I'll own customer comms — 18 tenants on v1, top 5 by ARR get white-glove migration support. Will file as ENG-153, due 06-19.
Great — marking ENG-152 done. Priya owns ENG-153 for comms by 06-19. Customers should hear from us before this leaks via the migration guide PR.
I'm starting on ENG-153 (v1 deprecation comms) today. Will share drafts by EOD. Need top-5 ARR list from Sam for white-glove cohort.
Top 5 by ARR: Helix ($156k), Brightline ($84k), Vesta ($72k), Verdant Foods, Northwind Pay. Sending account-rep contacts in DM.
Heads up — Stripe SE Naomi OOO until 6/15 per auto-reply. ENG-142 still blocked. Devin's escalating via partnerships if no reply by EOD Mon.

Heads up — Stripe webhook blocker (ENG-142) is now 4 days old, blocks Helix (ENG-148) and Brightline (ENG-151) v2 rollouts. Stripe SE OOO until Mon 06-15. If no response by EOD Mon I'll escalate via partnerships. Worth flagging to Marcus/Elena proactively?
Yes — let me draft a holding note for both. Will go out today after I get the v1 deprecation comms shape settled.

Standup-via-Slack since you're in back-to-backs: ENG-142 still blocked (Stripe SE OOO til Mon), ENG-148 + 151 blocked downstream, ENG-149 (p95 latency) progressing — Jordan has a Redis cache up in staging. v1 deprecation comms (ENG-153) starts today. Nothing on fire that you need to act on this morning.
Thanks. Top of my list: get Rachel her cohort numbers + slide 14 rewrite (overdue from yesterday). Also nudge Sam on customer refs. Ping me if Stripe responds.
Cycle 24 mid-week check: ENG-142 blocked is our biggest concern (customer impact via Helix + Brightline). ENG-150 (Northbound DD) is my own overdue. Let me know if I can unblock anything for you all.
